# LexGuild

> A modern, mobile-first mentorship and member engagement platform for attorneys, bar associations, law firms, and legal organizations.

LexGuild helps legal organizations run structured attorney mentorship programs with curated mentor matching, secure messaging, voice notes, and lightweight scheduling. It is delivered as a Progressive Web App so members can install it on iPhone or Android directly from the browser.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, install guide, pricing, FAQ, and contact.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How LexGuild collects, uses, and protects information.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): The terms that govern use of LexGuild.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Existing member sign-in.
- [Start your organization](/signup): Create a new organization.
- [Join with invite code](/join): Member onboarding via invite.
